Grand Ceremony at Pakistan Monument\n\nPakistan has launched a robust response to blatant Indian aggression under \"Operation Bunyan un Marsoos\" (Iron Wall), symbolizing national unity and an unwavering commitment to safeguarding the sovereignty and territorial integrity of the homeland.\n\nSeveral key Indian military sites have been targeted and destroyed.\n\nAccording to security sources, Pakistan has destroyed BrahMos Storage site in Beas area of India.\n\nAttacks are also continuing on other targets in India.\n\nPakistan has also destroyed airbase at Udhampur while an airfield at Pathankot.\n\nAll those bases in India which were used to attack Pakistani people and Masajids are being targeted.\n\nPakistan Armed Forces have also destroyed Brigade Headquarters, “K G Top”, while a supply depot in Uri has also been ruined completely.\n\nThrough a cyber attack, 70% electricity grid of India has been made dysfunctional.\n\nUdhampur airfield, from where missiles were fired on Sikhs in Amritsar (Indian Punjab) and other locations in Pakistan, has been hit.\n\nPakistan Armed Forces have ruined Indian artillery gun position in Dehrangyari, while BrahMos Storage site in Nagrota has also been destroyed, inflicting heavy losses.\n\nSecurity sources said multiple targets are being engaged in the operation.\n\nReports indicate heavy enemy casualties as well.\n\nPakistan Air Force's JF-17 Thunder hypersonic missiles destroyed India's S-400 system in Adampur.\n\nThe S-400 air defense system is valued at approximately 1.5 billion dollars. \n\nIndia's Sirsa Airfield has been destroyed.\n\nThe confirmation of the destruction of the Airfield has been made by Indian media itself.\n\nThe Indian Military Intelligence training center in Rajouri, responsible for orchestrating terrorism in Pakistan, has also been destroyed.\n\nIndia's Bathinda airfield has also been destroyed.\n\nPakistan Army has completely decimated India’s Dharam Sal 1, Danna 1, and Table Top posts opposite the Neza Pir sector.\n\nIndia’s Akhnoor Aviation Base has been destroyed.\n\nIndian Bernala Airfield in IIOJK has been destroyed.\n\nThe Indian Army's Brigade Headquarters in Bhimber Gali, IIOJK has also been destroyed.\n\nPakistan Army has also destroyed Indian posts directly opposite in the Phuklian sector.\n\nPakistan has completely destroyed the Rabtanwali Post, Danna Post, Khawaja Bhaik Complex and Ring Contour opposite Sankh along the Line of Control (LoC). \n\nPakistan Army has also destroyed the Halwara airfield.\n\nThe Armed Forces have already destroyed the air bases and fields at Adampur, Bhatinda, Suratgarh, Mamun, Akhnoor, Jammu, Sirsa, and Barnala.\n\nOn the Line of Control, Pakistan Army has completely destroyed Rahtanwali Post, Jazeera Post Complex, Kafir Mehri, Shahpar 3, and Ghadar Top.\n\nPakistan Army is giving a befitting response to the enemy. Our valiant Armed Forces have also silenced Indian guns.\n\nAn Indian Army's artillery gun position has also been destroyed in Mankot, Indian illegally occupied Jammu and Kashmir.\n\n🔴 LIVE ||
